summary: The code implements the initial backend structure for the Claude Co-Work Financial Assistant as specified in the instructions. All required files are present and correctly implemented, with appropriate authentication and session management.

criteria.name: Completeness
criteria.description: All files listed in the instructions are present in the result.

criteria.name: Correctness
criteria.description: Each function/class does what the instructions specify.

criteria.name: Quality
criteria.description: The code is well-structured with proper types and error handling.

criteria.name: Safety
criteria.description: No path traversal, no forbidden files, no hardcoded secrets.
